narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive capital expenditure from hyperscalers continues to drive demand for advanced AI chips and memory.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings
China export controls expand to HBM

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The massive market expansion for obesity and diabetes treatments continues to drive significant growth for leaders.
watchFor: Clinical trial failure for oral versions
Medicare implements strict price controls on GLP-1s

narratives.name: China Geopolitical Shifts
narratives.thesis: Tensions following the US-China summit create uncertainty and potential for new export restrictions on advanced logic chips.
watchFor: New US export restrictions on advanced logic chips
China retaliates with rare earth export bans

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Stronger-than-expected digital advertising demand and AI-driven content discovery are fueling growth for major platforms.
watchFor: Ad revenue growth decelerates below double digits
New antitrust rulings targeting digital ad monopolies

narratives.name: Consumer Value Rotation
narratives.thesis: Inflation-weary consumers are shifting spending toward discount retailers to preserve purchasing power.
watchFor: Real wages grow significantly — reduces value appeal
Consumer spending shifts back to premium brands

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Expansion
narratives.thesis: Rising digital threats and AI-driven attacks are driving increased enterprise spending on advanced security platforms.
watchFor: Major platform breach at a top-tier provider
Enterprise security budgets freeze due to recession fears

narratives.name: Margin Compression in Dining
narratives.thesis: Rising food costs and labor pressures are squeezing margins for major fast-food and casual dining chains.
watchFor: Beef and poultry prices stabilize
Menu price hikes lead to significant volume declines

narratives.name: Streaming Growth
narratives.thesis: Expansion of advertising tiers and content libraries is driving subscriber growth and revenue stability.
watchFor: Subscriber growth plateaus
Content spend increases without corresponding revenue lift

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Spiking Treasury yields are pressuring bank valuations and raising concerns about credit quality.
watchFor: Yields stabilize or drop — eases valuation pressure
Fed signals aggressive rate cuts

narratives.name: Real-Yield Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Rising real Treasury yields make non-yielding assets like gold less attractive to investors.
watchFor: Real yields drop below 1.5%
Central bank gold buying accelerates significantly

narratives.name: Agentic AI Integration
narratives.thesis: The next wave of software growth is being driven by the integration of autonomous AI agents into enterprise workflows.
watchFor: AI software revenue growth slows below 20%
Major enterprise software provider fails to monetize AI agents

narratives.name: China Aerospace Demand
narratives.thesis: Potential massive aircraft orders from China could provide a significant long-term tailwind for major manufacturers.
watchFor: US-China trade relations deteriorate further
Boeing production quality issues resurface

narratives.name: Real-Yield Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Rising real yields and a strong US dollar are creating headwinds for silver prices.
watchFor: Industrial demand for clean energy surges
Real yields decline sharply

Technology.thesis: Tech is broadly mixed as the AI capex cycle faces headwinds from a massive spike in Treasury yields and sticky inflation.
watchFor: 10Y yield breaks above 5.2% — crushes high-multiple software/semis
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM — forces a hawkish Fed repricing

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer Cyclical is mixed as value-oriented retail thrives while restaurants face margin pressure from rising costs.
watchFor: Unemployment rate > 4.5%
Consumer confidence index drops sharply

Communication Services.thesis: Communication Services is bullish, driven by strong digital advertising and streaming content growth.
watchFor: Ad spend deceleration in quarterly reports
Regulatory action against big tech platforms

Industrials.thesis: Industrials is mixed, with aerospace potential offset by broader macro-driven volatility.
watchFor: Global trade volume contraction
Boeing production delays persist

Healthcare.thesis: Healthcare is bullish, dominated by the massive, ongoing demand for GLP-1 obesity treatments.
watchFor: Regulatory crackdown on GLP-1 pricing
New competitor enters market with superior efficacy

Financials.thesis: Financials are mixed as rising yields create a tug-of-war between improved margins and valuation compression.
watchFor: Fed pivot to dovishness
Credit spreads widen significantly

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Consumer Defensive is bullish as inflation drives a rotation into discount retailers.
watchFor: Inflation spikes in food/staples
Consumer spending on essentials drops

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious Metals are bearish as rising real yields and a strong dollar pressure gold and silver.
watchFor: US Dollar Index (DXY) breaks below 100
Real yields enter negative territory
